prompt_text:
### Demographics: 50-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 6 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Major Depressive Disorder
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Glimepiride 2mg once daily; Insulin Degludec 15units once daily; Duloxetine (60 mg daily), Amlodipine (5 mg daily), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 45.7 kg; Height 155.9 cm; BMI 18.8 kg/m²; Blood pressure 133/83 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.1%; 9 months ago 9.1%; 6 months ago 9.4%; 3 months ago 9.6%; current 9.5%), FPG (12 months ago 210mg/dL; 9 months ago 252mg/dL; 6 months ago 265mg/dL; 3 months ago 223mg/dL; current 253mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 49.2kg; 9 months ago 46.1kg; 6 months ago 48.7kg; 3 months ago 47.8kg; current 45.7kg), Height (12 months ago 155.9cm; 9 months ago 155.9cm; 6 months ago 155.9cm; 3 months ago 155.9cm; current 155.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 20.0kg/m²; current 18.8kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 133mmHg; 9 months ago 137mmHg; 6 months ago 137mmHg; 3 months ago 131mmHg; current 133mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 82mmHg; 9 months ago 82mmHg; 6 months ago 81mmHg; 3 months ago 83mmHg; current 83mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 25U/L; 9 months ago 32U/L; 6 months ago 32U/L; 3 months ago 24U/L; current 28U/L), AST (12 months ago 15U/L; 9 months ago 18U/L; 6 months ago 16U/L; 3 months ago 25U/L; current 20U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.5mg/dL; current 0.4mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 69mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 69mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 67mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 66mL/min/1.73m²; current 67mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 43mg/g; 9 months ago 32mg/g; 6 months ago 45mg/g; 3 months ago 43mg/g; current 37mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 71mg/dL; 9 months ago 71mg/dL; 6 months ago 71mg/dL; 3 months ago 76mg/dL; current 74mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 51mg/dL; 9 months ago 47mg/dL; 6 months ago 47mg/dL; 3 months ago 50mg/dL; current 49mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 158mg/dL; 9 months ago 140mg/dL; 6 months ago 144mg/dL; 3 months ago 157mg/dL; current 150mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.0g/dL; 9 months ago 14.8g/dL; 6 months ago 14.1g/dL; 3 months ago 14.0g/dL; current 14.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.63 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
